# orm-admin-org-permissions-get-mask

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the orgPermissionsGetMask query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.orgPermissionsGetMask({ ids: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run orgPermissionsGetMask

```typescript
const result = await db.query.orgPermissionsGetMask({ ids: '<value>' }).execute();
```
